description: Compute PCA, the kNN neighborhood graph, and a UMAP (and optionally t-SNE) embedding on a normalized object. Writes a PCA variance-ratio elbow plot to help choose the number of PCs.
rules: input should be a normalized object (optionally HVG-subset / scaled)
read-only input — writes a new reduced.h5ad + variance/colored plots under record_store
USE_REP lets the graph be built from a custom obsm key (e.g. X_pca_harmony from batch_correct)
COLOR is a space-separated list of obs/var keys to color the UMAP
usage: Set INPUT. Optional: N_COMPS, N_PCS, N_NEIGHBORS, USE_REP, TSNE=1, COLOR, NO_PLOTS=1. Output: reduced.h5ad.
limitation: Requires scanpy installed; without it the porter writes a {} placeholder reduced.h5ad and still passes.
